C1.descriptionTemplate: Lily obtains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: At turn start, gain 10% Max HP:{Endure}. When Lily applies a Shield, inflict [Poison:Arg2] stacks of {Poison} on the enemy with the highest HP.

C3.descriptionTemplate: Gain [Block:Arg1] Shield. Lily's base Shield increases by 0.25% for each 1% {Death Resistance}. Lily obtains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus.

C4.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG, trigger [Arg3]% of the target's {Poison}. If a Critical Hit occurs, the trigger ratio increases to [Arg4]%. This is considered a {Strike}. For each stack of {Endure}, increase DMG by 2 and remove {Endure} after use.

C5.descriptionTemplate: Obtain [Block:Arg1] Shield and inflict [Poison:Arg2] stacks of {Poison} on all enemies. For every 1% {Death Resistance} Lily has, the Base Shield increases by 0.25%. Until the start of next turn, gain [Arg3] stacks of {Endure} for each attack received.

Exalt.descriptionTemplate: Obtain [Block:Arg1] Shield. Restore [Arg2]% of {Endure} stacks as HP and remove {Endure}. Each time you are attacked, inflict [Poison:Arg4] stacks of {Poison} to the attacker for 1 turn.

OverExalt.descriptionTemplate: Increase {Endure} Limit by 100% for this battle, granting {Endure} equal to Max HP. Add 2 {Strike to Protect} cards with additional {Exhaust} to your hand.

T1.descriptionTemplate:
For every 1% {Death Resistance} Lily and her equipped WoD & Covenant have, the Base Shield of {Forbidden Swamp} and {Defense} increases by 0.25%, and in Boss Battles, the accumulation and limit of {Endure} increase by 0.25%.
When Lily is in the team, gain 1 stack of {Endure} for each lost HP, with an {Endure} stack limit equal to Max HP.

T2.descriptionTemplate: Obtain [Arg1] Aliemus after the start of exploration.

T3.descriptionTemplate:
This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF are increased by [Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
The Final DMG of Lily's {Strike} is increased by [Arg3]%, and the increase is doubled during Boss Battle. After being attacked by an {Ultra} enemy, gain a Delayed HP Recovery equal to [Arg4]% of the HP lost from the attack.

E1.descriptionTemplate: When your current HP is below 50%, {Forbidden Swamp} gains an additional shield, and the {Poison} effect is doubled.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Obtain [Block:Arg1] Shield and inflict [Poison:Arg2] stacks of {Poison} to all enemies. For every 1% {Death Resistance} Lily has, the Base Shield is increased by 0.25%. Until the start of next turn, gain [Arg3] stacks of {Endure} for each attack received. If HP is below 50%, gain an additional Shield and the applied {Poison} is doubled.

E2.descriptionTemplate: {Strike to Protect} {Prepare 1} upgraded to {Prepare 2}, Base DMG and Crit. Rate increased by 20%.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG, trigger [Arg3]% of the target's {Poison}. If a Critical Hit occurs, the trigger rate increases to [Arg4]%. Treated as a Strike. For each stack of {Endure}, increase DMG by 2, and remove {Endure} after use. This card's Crit. Rate is increased by 20%.

E3.descriptionTemplate: At turn start, obtain {Endure} equal to 10% Max HP. {Undying Flower Upon Slime} and {Strike to Protect} only remove half of the {Endure}.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Obtain [Block:Arg1] Shield. Restore [Arg2]% of {Endure} stacks as HP and remove half of {Endure}. Each time you are attacked, inflict [Poison:Arg4] stacks of {Poison} to the attacker, lasting 1 turn.

Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG, trigger [Arg3]% of the target's {Poison}. If a Critical Hit occurs, the trigger rate increases to [Arg4]%. Considered a {Strike}. For each stack of {Endure}, increase DMG by 2, and remove half of the {Endure} after use. This card's Crit. Rate is increased by 20%.
